subcodes.first_line: The inscribed Tablet hath been traced by the Finger of Power. Blessed be they who recognize that it is a dewdrop from the Ocean of Utterance and bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح مسطور رقم من اصبع القدره طوبی لقوم یعرفون انه رشح من بحر البیان یشهد
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Manifestation of God as sun
